name: C-5 gate is disabled when the profile sets sod_gate_on_critical_paths false per the architecture toggle
command: printf 'sod_gate_on_critical_paths: false\n' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --enforce --pr-sha abc123 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt && grep -q 'gate disabled by profile' err.txt && echo disabled 1>&2
